rss.channel:
朝九晚五 https://9to5mac.com/ Apple 新闻和 Mac 谣言全天爆发2026 年 3 月 18 日星期三 20:00:29 +0000 en-US每小时1 https://wordpress.org/?v=6.9.4 https://9to5mac.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/6/2019/10/cropped-cropped-mac1-1.png?w=32朝九晚五https://9to5mac.com/ 32 32 146091842 watchOS 26.4 修复了 Apple Watch Workout 应用程序的一个主要问题https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/watchos-26-4-fixes-a-major-apple-watch-workout-app-complaint/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/watchos-26-4-fixes-a-major-apple-watch-workout-app-complaint/#respondZac Hall Wed, 18 Mar 2026 20:00:28 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044098

苹果在 watchOS 26 中重新设计了 Workout 应用，但并非所有人都喜欢新的 Apple Watch 运动追踪体验。事实证明，苹果一直在倾听，因为 watchOS 26.4 解决了人们对新设计的主要抱怨。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/watchos-26-4-fixes-a-major-apple-watch-workout-app-complaint/feed/ 0 1044098 苹果在人工智能诉讼中被点名，称其数据集不支持苹果智能https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/apple-named-in-ai-lawsuit-over-data-set-it-already-says-doesnt-power-apple-intelligence/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/apple-named-in-ai-lawsuit-over-data-set-it-already-says-doesnt-power-apple-intelligence/#commentsZac Hall Wed, 18 Mar 2026 19:48:54 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044122

据路透社报道，出版商《心灵鸡汤》提起的新人工智能诉讼中点名苹果公司。然而，诉讼指向苹果已经表示不支持苹果情报的数据集。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/apple-named-in-ai-lawsuit-over-data-set-it-already-says-doesnt-power-apple-intelligence/feed/ 1 1044122 iOS 26.4 终于让家庭共享成员使用自己的支付方式https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-to-finally-let-family-sharing-members-use-their-own- payment-methods/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-to-finally-let-family-sharing-members-use-their-own- payment-methods/#commentsMarcus Mendes Wed, 18 Mar 2026 19:48:02 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044126

随着今天早些时候发布的 iOS 26.4 RC，苹果解决了家庭共享长期存在的限制之一。这是新内容。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-to-finally-let-family-sharing-members-use-their-own- payment-methods/feed/ 1 1044126 macOS 26.4 发行说明：Apple 详细介绍了 Mac 的六项新功能https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/macos-26-4-release-notes-apple-details-6-new-features-for-mac/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/macos-26-4-release-notes-apple-details-6-new-features-for-mac/#respondChance Miller Wed, 18 Mar 2026 19:23:56 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044107

除了iOS 26.4 RC之外，Apple 今天还向开发者和公共 Beta 测试人员发布了 macOS 26.4 RC 。此次更新为 Mac 用户带来了六项变化，苹果今天在其发行说明中首次确认了所有这些变化。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/macos-26-4-release-notes-apple-details-6-new-features-for-mac/feed/ 0 1044107 iOS 26.4 发布日期：iPhone 新功能即将推出https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-release-date-heres-when-new-iphone-features-are-coming/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-release-date-heres-when-new-iphone-features-are-coming/#commentsRyan Christoffel Wed, 18 Mar 2026 18:45:00 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1040528

iOS 26.4 是一次重大更新，在 Apple Music、播客、CarPlay 等领域引入了大量新功能。这是预计其公开发布的时间。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-release-date-heres-when-new-iphone-features-are-coming/feed/ 2 1040528 iOS 26.4 修复了 iPhone 键盘准确性，具体方法如下https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-fixes-iphone-keyboard/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-fixes-iphone-keyboard/#commentsChance Miller Wed, 18 Mar 2026 18:25:09 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044091

苹果今天向开发者和公共 Beta 测试者发布了iOS 26.4 RC，为最快本月晚些时候正式发布奠定了基础。

苹果还分享了 iOS 26.4 的官方发行说明，确认该更新提高了在 iPhone 上快速打字时的键盘准确性。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-fixes-iphone-keyboard/feed/ 4 1044091 iOS 26.4 大幅升级了我最常用的控制中心功能之一https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-upgrades-one-of-my-most-used-control-center-features-in-a-big-way/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-upgrades-one-of-my-most-used-control-center-features-in-a-big-way/#commentsRyan Christoffel Wed, 18 Mar 2026 17:53:59 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044055

iOS 26.4 即将发布， 其中以 Apple Music 中的许多新功能为主角。 iOS 26.4 中的控制中心还进行了与音乐相关的改进：即使您处于离线状态，Shazam 歌曲识别现在也能正常工作。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-upgrades-one-of-my-most-used-control-center-features-in-a-big-way/feed/ 2 1044055 Apple 重点介绍了 iOS 26.4 中 iPhone 的 13 项增强功能https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/apple-highlights-13-enhancements-coming-to-iphone-with-ios-26-4/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/apple-highlights-13-enhancements-coming-to-iphone-with-ios-26-4/#commentsZac Hall Wed, 18 Mar 2026 17:27:35 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044053

Apple 发布了第一个 iOS 26.4 RC 版本，重点介绍了 iPhone 的 13 项增强功能，这意味着三件事。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/apple-highlights-13-enhancements-coming-to-iphone-with-ios-26-4/feed/ 4 1044053 Apple 首次推出 tvOS 26.4、watchOS 26.4 等版本的 RC https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/apple-debuts-rc-for-tvos-26-4-watchos-26-4-and-more/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/apple-debuts-rc-for-tvos-26-4-watchos-26-4-and-more/#commentsRyan Christoffel Wed, 18 Mar 2026 17:18:39 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1043688

Beta 测试人员、tvOS 26.4 的 RC（候选发布）版本、watchOS 26.4 等现已推出。这是值得期待的事情。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/apple-debuts-rc-for-tvos-26-4-watchos-26-4-and-more/feed/ 1 1043688 PSA：Spotify 正在调查导致用户取消计划的故障[更新：已修复] https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/psa-spotify-investigating-outage-thats-kicking-users-off-their-plans/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/psa-spotify-investigating-outage-thats-kicking-users-off-their-plans/#commentsChance Miller Wed, 18 Mar 2026 17:16:06 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044052

东部时间下午 1:30 更新：Spotify 表示问题已得到解决。原故事如下。

如果您今天下午在访问 Spotify 时遇到问题，那么您并不孤单。该流媒体音乐服务已确认存在一个持续存在的问题，导致一些听众被取消订阅。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/psa-spotify-investigating-outage-thats-kicking-users-off-their-plans/feed/ 1 1044052 macOS 26.4 RC 现已可供开发者使用https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/macos-26-4-rc-now-available-for-developers/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/macos-26-4-rc-now-available-for-developers/#commentsMarcus Mendes Wed, 18 Mar 2026 17:14:33 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1043662

继上周推出 beta 4 后，Apple 现在推出 macOS 26.4 候选版本。这是值得期待的事情。
